title: Wire up gitleaks scanning
description: Add a secret scanner as a pre-commit hook and CI gate, baseline verified non-secrets, and confirm it blocks new credentials.
body: Use when a repo needs enforced secret scanning. Do not allowlist a finding without verifying it is not a real secret. Actions: add gitleaks as a pre-commit hook; add the same scan as a required CI check; run an initial full scan and rotate any live secrets found; baseline only confirmed non-secrets; test with a planted dummy token. Validation signals include the hook blocking the planted token and CI failing on a new secret. Risk boundary: never disable the scanner or baseline a verified secret to ship faster, and escalate any real hit as a leak requiring rotation.
